objectives: Define `naturalDensity` using `Filter.Tendsto atTop` on the ratio sequence for height-ordered polynomial families.
Write sorry-bodied `theorem squarefreeDiscDensity` (Thm 1.1) and `theorem maximalOrderDensity` (Thm 1.2) with correct types that typecheck.
Define the height function `height : (Polynomial ℤ) → ℝ`.
State the two sorry-axioms: `axiom ekedahlSieve` and `axiom geometryOfNumbersCount`.
